object.name: getChatAdministrators
object.description: Use this method to get a list of administrators in a chat. Returns an Array of ChatMember objects.
object.html_description: Use this method to get a list of administrators in a chat. Returns an Array of ChatMember objects.
object.rst_description: Use this method to get a list of administrators in a chat. Returns an Array of :class:`aiogram.types.chat_member.ChatMember` objects.

annotations.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel in the format @username
annotations.html_description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel in the format @username
annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel in the format :code:`@username`
annotations.name: chat_id

annotations.description: Pass True to additionally receive all bots that are administrators of the chat. By default, bots other than the current bot are omitted.
annotations.html_description: Pass True to additionally receive all bots that are administrators of the chat. By default, bots other than the current bot are omitted.
annotations.rst_description: Pass :code:`True` to additionally receive all bots that are administrators of the chat. By default, bots other than the current bot are omitted.
annotations.name: return_bots
